purpose: Pre-dawn Ramadan Suhoor meal spread — light, nourishing foods in a quiet pre-dawn atmosphere before the Fajr prayer and start of fast.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Suhoor pre-dawn Ramadan meal spread photography, quiet intimate pre-dawn atmosphere lit by soft warm dim lamplight and faint blue pre-sunrise light through window suggesting 4am before Fajr prayer, nourishing light foods: labneh with olive oil, fresh bread, eggs, {featured_product}, dates, water and milk, minimal clean styling, small crescent moon visible through window or in decor accent, contemplative serene atmosphere, no people, top-down or 45-degree angle, hyper-realistic food detail, shot on 35mm at f/4, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: bright daylight (must feel pre-dawn)
notes: Intents: all. Saudi adaptation guidance: Suhoor must visually communicate pre-dawn, not nighttime or morning. The blue-hour pre-sunrise window light is the key atmospheric signal. Foods should be nourishing and light, not heavy feast items (that is Iftar). Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 1 post per week during Ramadan. Compliance level: elevated.
